projectDescription: A BepInEx mod for Gorilla Tag that automatically disables leaf GameObjects at runtime to improve visual clarity or performance.
keyFeatures: Automatically disables leaf GameObjects in Gorilla Tag on startup
Fetches target object names dynamically from a remote URL
Runs as a BepInEx plugin with no player configuration required
Polls and disables matching objects every 5 seconds for persistent effect
publicApiSurface: StartDelayed() — waits 2 seconds before loading object names
LoadFromURL() — downloads object name list from remote source
DisableObjects() — polls every 5 seconds and disables matching GameObjects
